mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_approval (leave_request_id, approver_id, action, comment) VALUES (#{leaveRequestId}, #{approverId}, #{action}, #{comment})
mapper.select: SELECT id, leave_request_id, approver_id, action, comment, acted_at FROM leave_approval WHERE leave_request_id = #{leaveRequestId} ORDER BY acted_at DESC
SELECT id, leave_request_id, approver_id, action, comment, acted_at FROM leave_approval ORDER BY acted_at DESC
